title: More Jewels [More Magic Series]
body:
# 📦 Installation
 

### Required

- Jewelry
- More Spell Attributes
 

### Highly Recommended
 
- Fallen Paladins and Priests
- Bards
- Druids
- Blood Mages
 

# 💎 Features
 

Collect additional Jewels, exclusivly created for the More Magic Series
Craft some Jewelry with vanilla materials and new gems that the mod introduces
Find the Jewelry in dungeon chests
Benefit from the attributes by equipping the Jewels
 

# 🔧 Configuration
 

**Jewels bonuses:**
- config/more_jewels/jewels
